headline: E-commerce giant shuts down office as layoffs rise
summary: San Francisco is facing growing pressure from businesses as they step away from the city. Once the center of the tech boom, the city is seeing a steady wave of companies scaling back or leaving altogether, driven by high costs, shifting workplace dynamics, and a struggling office market. From ...

headline: Block’s AI Overhaul And Square Handheld Test Investor Confidence
summary: Block (NYSE:XYZ) has cut roughly 40% of its workforce as part of a broad AI driven redesign of its operations. CEO Jack Dorsey is using advanced AI tools to reshape company structure, with an emphasis on efficiency and regulatory compliance. At the same time, Block has rolled out its new Square Handheld device in live use at the Coachella Valley music festival. Square Handheld supported Wild West Social House's pop up retail expansion in a fast moving, high volume festival setting. For...

headline: Morning Brief: The future of Netflix is now
summary: The stock market put in another surge on Friday to close out a week of record highs.
